title: Dev step output
description: Per-requirement implementation status produced by the Dev step. Captures which files were touched per R# so a downstream review/routing system can summon specialist reviewers based on the enrichment spine.

summary.description: 1-2 sentences on what was done across all requirements.

commit_message.description: Conventional-commits style message capturing the change set.

requirements.description: One entry per R# from the brief.

status.description: Whether the requirement was fully implemented or hit a blocker.

files_changed.description: Repository-relative paths the developer touched while satisfying this requirement.

dev_notes.description: Optional: short notes describing how the requirement was met or why it is blocked.
